# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that accepts custom build commands as workflow inputs. Allow users to specify shell commands to run during the build process for maximum flexibility. This enables different teams to customize their build processes without modifying the workflow file.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build
on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
      
      - name: Setup
        uses: actions/setup-node@v2
        with:
          node-version: '14'

      - name: Custom build
        run: |
          echo 'Running user-defined commands...'
          ${{ github.event.inputs.buildCommands }}
        shell: bash

      - name: Show build info
        run: node -v

  inputs:
    buildCommands:
      description: 'The shell commands to run during the build process'
      required: true
      default: 'npm install && npm test'
